tool.name: write-memory
tool.description:
Write / update / remove items in the current agent session's working memory.
- action: one of `add` (default), `update`, `remove`, `clear` - add: insert a new item (requires `content`; optional `key` / `type` / `priority` / `pinned`) - update: overwrite the item at `key` (requires `key`; optional `content` / `type` / `priority` / `pinned`) - remove: delete the item at `key` (requires `key`) - clear: remove all items (no args) - key: identifier for the item; auto-generated when omitted on `add` - type: optional category label (e.g. note, fact, task) - priority: integer importance score (higher = more important; used by budgeted read), default 0 - pinned: boolean — when true the item is always included by budgeted read regardless of token budget, default false - content: the memory payload text (the item's stored content)
Returns a confirmation summary noting the operation performed and the remaining item count, or an honest error result when no memory store is configured (no provider wired).

tool-result.output: Added memory item (key=user-pref). Total items in store: 1

write-memory.content: User prefers concise answers and concrete examples.

tool-result.output: Updated memory item (key=user-pref). Total items in store: 1
Removed memory item (key=user-pref). Remaining items in store: 0
Cleared all memory items. Remaining items in store: 0
